SifterSearchBundlePath.description: URL path (relative to the served site root) the client loads the Pagefind bundle from.

SifterSearchFullText.description: Whether the search box's full-text 'search for pages containing' affordance is shown (linking to the skin's native Special:Search). Set false on sites with no full-text search page, e.g. a static export.

SifterSearchResultsPage.description: Title of a content page on which to mount the full Pagefind results UI (PagefindUI), driven by a ?search= query. When set, the search box's full-text affordance navigates there instead of to the single top result. Empty disables the results page.

SifterSearchOutputDir.description: Filesystem path of the Pagefind bundle directory itself, i.e. the directory served at SifterSearchBundlePath (e.g. <docroot>/pagefind). Empty disables index building.

SifterSearchCacheDir.description: Directory holding the rendered HTML the indexer crawls, kept between runs for incremental rebuilds. Defaults to a subdirectory of $wgCacheDirectory.

SifterSearchPagefindBinary.description: Path to the Pagefind binary. Empty auto-detects the bundled binary for this platform under the extension's bin/ directory.

SifterSearchBatchSeconds.description: Delay rebuilds by this many seconds so a burst of edits coalesces into one batch. 0 rebuilds as soon as the job runs (edits still batch via job de-duplication).
